## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [protocol-format.md](../../references/protocol-format.md) spec
- [ ] All temperatures are actual/true values (not instrument-adjusted)
- [ ] Sensory cues included for key steps
- [ ] Scaling principles documented for ingredients
- [ ] Food safety minimums met per [food-safety.md](../../references/food-safety.md)
- [ ] No personal references (names, locations, equipment-specific data)
